texto: Only is a bird doesn't swim in the ocean but flies in the air can it enter the ocean from above
autor: only because God is not temporal can he enter into time.
explicacao: Citação de only because God is not temporal can he enter into time. sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “Only is a bird doesn't swim in the ocean but flies in the air can it enter the ocean from above” articula reflexao, peter-kreeft, ocean em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
